system_prompt:
You are an expert in OpenFOAM simulation and numerical modeling. Your task is to modify and rewrite OpenFOAM files to fix the reported error. Please do not propose solutions that require modifying any parameters declared in the user requirement, try other approaches instead. You will receive a rewrite_plan. Follow it strictly: only modify files listed in rewrite_plan.target_files and apply only the requested changes. Do not modify files outside the plan. Return the complete, corrected file contents in JSON format: list of foamfile: [{file_name: 'file_name', folder_name: 'folder_name', content: 'content'}]. Ensure your response includes only modified file content with no extra text, as it will be parsed using Pydantic.
Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown/backticks). Schema: {"list_foamfile": [{"file_name": string, "folder_name": string, "content": string}]}.
user_prompt:
<foamfiles>list_foamfile=[FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSchemes', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSchemes;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

fluxScheme      Kurganov;

ddtSchemes
{
    default         Euler;
}

gradSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear;
}

divSchemes
{
    default         none;
    div(tauMC)      Gauss linear;
}

laplacianSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear corrected;
}

interpolationSchemes
{
    default         linear;
    reconstruct(rho) vanLeer;
    reconstruct(U)  vanLeerV;
    reconstruct(T)  vanLeer;
}

snGradSchemes
{
    default         corrected;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSolution', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSolution;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

solvers
{
    "(rho|rhoU|rhoE)"
    {
        solver          diagonal;
    }

    U
    {
        solver          smoothSolver;
        smoother        GaussSeidel;
        nSweeps         2;
        tolerance       1e-09;
        relTol          0.01;
    }

    e
    {
        $U;
        tolerance       1e-09;
        relTol          0.01;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='momentumTransport', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "constant";
    object      momentumTransport;
}

simulationType  laminar;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='physicalProperties', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "constant";
    object      physicalProperties;
}

thermoType
{
    type            hePsiThermo;
    mixture         pureMixture;
    transport       const;
    thermo          hConst;
    equationOfState perfectGas;
    specie          specie;
    energy          sensibleInternalEnergy;
}

mixture
{
    specie
    {
        molWeight   11640.3;
    }
    thermodynamics
    {
        Cp          2.5;
        Hf          0;
    }
    transport
    {
        mu          0;
        Pr          1.0;
    }
}'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='U', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       volVectorField;
    object      U;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [0 1 -1 0 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform (10 0 0);

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform (10 0 0);
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            inletOutlet;
        inletValue      uniform (10 0 0);
        value           uniform (10 0 0);
    }

    bottom
    {
        type            empty;
    }

    top
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    wedge
    {
        type            slip;
    }

    frontAndBack
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='T', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       volScalarField;
    object      T;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [0 0 0 1 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform 1;

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform 1;
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    bottom
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    wedge
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    frontAndBack
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='p', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       volScalarField;
    object      p;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [1 -1 -2 0 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform 1;

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform 1;
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            waveTransmissive;
        field           p;
        psi             thermo:psi;
        gamma           1.4;
        fieldInf        1;
        lInf            1;
        value           uniform 1;
    }

    bottom
    {
        type            symmetryPlane;
    }

    top
    {
        type            waveTransmissive;
        field           p;
        psi             thermo:psi;
        gamma           1.4;
        fieldInf        1;
        lInf            1;
        value           uniform 1;
    }

    wedge
    {
        type            slip;
    }

    frontAndBack
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='controlDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "system";
    object      controlDict;
}

application     rhoCentralFoam;

startFrom       startTime;

startTime       0;

stopAt          endTime;

endTime         0.2;

deltaT          0.001;

writeControl    adjustableRunTime;

writeInterval   0.01;

purgeWrite      0;

writeFormat     ascii;

writePrecision  6;

writeCompression off;

timeFormat      general;

timePrecision   6;

runTimeModifiable yes;

adjustTimeStep  no;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='blockMeshDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      blockMeshDict;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

scale   1;

vertices
(
    (-0.15242  0        -0.005)  // 0
    ( 0.3048  0        -0.005)  // 1
    ( 0.3048  0.1524   -0.005)  // 2
    (-0.15242  0.1524   -0.005)  // 3

    (-0.15242  0        0.005)   // 4
    ( 0.3048  0        0.005)   // 5
    ( 0.3048  0.1524   0.005)   // 6
    (-0.15242  0.1524   0.005)   // 7
);

blocks
(
    hex (0 1 2 3 4 5 6 7) (60 30 1) simpleGrading (1 1 1)
);

edges
(
);

boundary
(
    inlet
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (0 4 5 1)
        );
    }

    outlet
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (2 3 7 6)
        );
    }

    top
    {
        type zeroGradient;
        faces
        (
            (4 5 6 7)
        );
    }

    wedge
    {
        type wall;
        faces
        (
            (0 3 7 4)
        );
    }

    frontAndBack
    {
        type empty;
        faces
        (
            (0 3 7 4)
            (1 2 6 5)
        );
    }
);

mergePatchPairs
(
);

// ************************************************************************* //')]</foamfiles>

<reviewer_analysis>## Error Analysis

### Error 1: `log.blockMesh` — Trying to specify a boundary face on an internal face

**Error Message:**
```
Trying to specify a boundary face 4(0 4 5 1) on the face on cell 0 which is either an internal face or already belongs to some other patch.  This is face 0 of patch 0 named inlet.
```

This is the same error as Attempts 7 and 8. The face `(0 4 5 1)` is being claimed as both an `inlet` boundary face and an internal face shared by two blocks. Previous fixes attempted to remove the `bottom` patch or merge into a single block, but the fundamental issue persists: **the block topology continues to create shared internal faces**.

### Error 2: `log.rhoCentralFoam` — Cannot find mesh

Cascading error — `blockMesh` failed, so no mesh exists for the solver.

### Root Cause

Despite multiple attempts to restructure the block topology, the current implementation still creates **shared internal faces** between blocks. The face `(0 4 5 1)` is consistently the top face of one block and the bottom face of another, making it internal and ineligible for boundary specification.

The previous single-block approach worked temporarily but apparently reverted. The core problem is that **any multi-block topology with blocks stacked vertically will inevitably share top/bottom faces**, and those shared faces cannot simultaneously serve as boundary patches and internal faces.

### Proposed Fix

**Adopt a strictly single-block topology with no shared internal faces**, combined with careful vertex ordering to ensure all six faces have outward-pointing normals:

1. **Define 8 unique vertices** representing the full rectangular prism (no duplicates):
   - Bottom layer (z = -0.005): vertices 0,1,2,3
   - Top layer (z = +0.005): vertices 4,5,6,7
   - Where:
     - 0: (-0.15242, 0, -0.005)
     - 1: (0.3048, 0, -0.005)
     - 2: (0.3048, 0.1524, -0.005)
     - 3: (-0.15242, 0.1524, -0.005)
     - 4: (-0.15242, 0, 0.005)
     - 5: (0.3048, 0, 0.005)
     - 6: (0.3048, 0.1524, 0.005)
     - 7: (-0.15242, 0.1524, 0.005)

2. **Define a SINGLE block** that traces the outer perimeter of this rectangular prism with the wedge cut represented as a boundary face. The block vertices should be ordered to produce outward-pointing normals on all faces:
   - `hex (0 1 5 4 3 2 6 7)`

   Verify face orientations:
   - Bottom: 0→1→2→3 (clockwise from +z → normal downward, outward) ✓
   - Top: 4→5→6→7 (clockwise from +z → normal downward, outward) ✓
   - Front: 0→1→5→4 (clockwise from +y → normal -y, outward) ✓
   - Back: 3→2→6→7 (clockwise from +y → normal +y, outward) ✓
   - Left: 0→4→7→3 (clockwise from +x → normal -x, outward) ✓
   - Right: 3→7→6→2 (clockwise from +x → normal +x, outward) ✓

3. **Define boundary patches** based on the outer faces of this single block:
   - `inlet`: face `(0 4 5 1)` — the front face at y=0
   - `outlet`: face `(2 3 7 6)` — the back face at y=0.1524
   - `top`: face `(4 5 6 7)` — the top face at z=0.005
   - `wedge`: face `(3 2 6 4)` — the slanted wedge face (this cuts through the block, turning it into a wedge-shaped domain with a wall boundary)
   - `frontAndBack`: keep as empty faces `(0 3 7 4)` and `(1 2 6 5)`

4. **Critical detail**: The `wedge` face `(3 2 6 4)` must be added to the `boundary` dictionary. This face cuts across the block, dividing it into the wedge-shaped computational domain. The remaining faces of the block become the external boundaries (`inlet`, `outlet`, `top`), while the cut face becomes the physical `wedge` wall boundary with `type slip`.

This approach uses only **one block**, eliminating all possibilities of shared/internal faces. Every face in the `boundary` dictionary belongs to exactly one cell, satisfying OpenFOAM's topology requirements. The wedge is implemented as a cut face within the single block, with the `slip` boundary condition applied to that face.</reviewer_analysis>
<rewrite_plan>{'target_files': [{'file': 'system/blockMeshDict', 'changes': 'Replace the entire block definition with a single hex block using vertices 0-7 in order: hex (0 1 5 4 3 2 6 7) with grading (60 30 1). Redefine boundary patches: inlet as face 0 4 5 1, outlet as face 2 3 7 6, top as face 4 5 6 7, wedge as face 3 2 6 4 with type slip, and keep frontAndBack as empty faces 0 3 7 4 and 1 2 6 5'}]}</rewrite_plan>

<user_requirement>Perform a 2D supersonic flow simulation over a wedge. Create a 3D geometry spanning from -0.15242 m to 0.3048 m in the x-direction, 0 m to 0.1524 m in the y-direction, and -0.005 m to 0.005 m in the z-direction. The simulation starts at 0.0 seconds and runs until 0.2 seconds with a time step (deltaT) of 0.0001 seconds. The results are written every 0.02 seconds. The inlet velocity is 10 m/s, inlet temperature is 1 K and inlet pressure is 1 Pa. The wedge boundary uses slip boundary condition for velocity. Use normalized thermodynamic properties where molWeight is set to 11640.3, Cp is 2.5, Pr is 1.0, and dynamic viscosity mu is 0. This corresponds to a gas constant R of 0.7143 and a specific heat ratio of 1.4. Use rhoCentralFoam solver.</user_requirement>

Please update OpenFOAM files according to rewrite_plan only. Only include files from rewrite_plan.target_files in your output.
